Labour and Social Research Institute – Welcome to the Labour and Social Research Institute (LASRI) The Labour and Social Research Institute (LASRI) is a dedicated research organisation working to address Bihar’s critical social and economic challenges. Founded by alumni from the Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS), LASRI blends academic excellence with grassroots action to create sustainable solutions through policy-driven research. Empowering Bihar through data, dialogue, and development. About Us LASRI was envisioned during the COVID-19 pandemic when reverse migration exposed long-standing vulnerabilities in Bihar’s social fabric. With limited industrial presence, declining agricultural viability, and rising migration, the state faces deep-rooted challenges. Founded by passionate professionals from TISS, LASRI aims to bridge the gap between academic research and practical policy implementation to support inclusive development. Read More Our Mission & Vision Mission: To conduct evidence-based research that informs and influences public policy for inclusive and sustainable development in Bihar. Vision:To become a leading institution for social research and a trusted partner in shaping policy, addressing issues like labour rights, climate resilience, land reforms, and migration. Seminars/Events Capacity Building Workshop for Female Construction workers in Madhepura Capacity Building Workshop for Female Construction workers in Madhepura May 24, 2025 Labour and Social Research Institute (LASRI) recently conducted a capacity building… Read More Capacity Building Workshop for Female Construction Workers in Kishanganj Capacity Building Workshop for Female Construction Workers in Kishanganj May 24, 2025 Labour and Social Research Institute (LASRI) recently conducted a capacity building… Read More Bihar Labour Dialogue Bihar Labour Dialogue March 1, 2025 Bihar Labour Dialogue 2025 A Milestone in Addressing Bihar’s Labour Challenges. We… Read More Get Involved Be a part of Bihar’s research-driven transformation.
